Convenient Amenities: The boat house features a spa bath, walk-in shower, and a dining area. Additional amenities include a minibar, microwave, and dishwasher. Free on-site parking is available.
Prime Location: Located in the city centre, the boat house is less than 1 km from Calais Railway Station and Calais Lighthouse. Nearby attractions include The Chamber of Commerce and Industry of Calais and The International Centre of Lace and Fashion.
Guest Favorites: Guests highly rate the sailing, boating, and the property's location.

hotels.description_en:

Chalets and cottages offer mountain views and a seating area with a sofa.  Each has a private bathroom with a shower and toilet. Free Wi-Fi access is provided on site.
Each chalet has a fully equipped kitchen and guests have access to BBQ facilities on site. A pizzeria is 400 metres away and a Corsican restaurant is 800 metres from the property.
The campsite has a private riverside beach and is 1.5 km from Porto Village. Boat rental, diving and nautical activities are possible near the property.
Hiking trails are accessible near the property and the Piana Calanques are 15 km away.

El camping tiene una playa privada junto al rГғВӯo y se encuentra a 1,5 km de Porto Village. Cerca del establecimiento se pueden alquilar barcos y practicar actividades nГғВЎuticas y buceo.
El establecimiento estГғВЎ cerca de varias rutas de senderismo y a 15 km de los Calanques de Piana.

Cada chalГғВ© tem uma cozinha totalmente equipada e os hГғВіspedes tГғВӘm acesso a comodidades para churrascos no local. A propriedade encontra-se a 400 metros de uma pizzaria e a 800 metros de um restaurante CГғВіrsega.

hotels.description_it:

A vostra disposizione troverete cottage e chalet con vista sulle montagne, area salotto fornita di divano, e bagno privato completo di doccia e servizi igienici. Non manca inoltre la connessione WiFi gratuita.
In ogni chalet usufruirete anche di una cucina interamente attrezzata, e potrete utilizzare il barbecue in loco. Il complesso dista poi 400 metri da una pizzeria e 800 metri da un ristorante di cucina corsa.

Guests can relax in Hotel EuropeГўвӮ¬в„ўs various lounges or enjoy a drink in the bar or on the terrace. Some cafes can be found on the square next to the hotel.

The Gourjade Park and lakes of Ste FГғВ©rГғВ©ole are easily accessible from the hotel. Hotel de l'Europe is situated between Albi, Cordes-sur-Ciel and Toulouse. Private parking is possible at a location nearby and valet parking is available at an extra cost.

Les hГғВ©bergements disposent de la climatisation et dГўвӮ¬в„ўune tГғВ©lГғВ©vision. Vous bГғВ©nГғВ©ficierez dГўвӮ¬в„ўune cuisine entiГғВЁrement ГғВ©quipГғВ©e, ainsi que dГўвӮ¬в„ўune salle de bains privative comprenant une douche et un sГғВЁche-cheveux. Un micro-ondes et un grille-pain sont ГғВ©galement disponibles, de mГғВӘme quГўвӮ¬в„ўune machine ГғВ  cafГғВ© et une bouilloire.

Vous pourrez pratiquer le vГғВ©lo ou vous dГғВ©tendre dans le jardin.

Vous sГғВ©journerez ГғВ  respectivement 18 km et 19 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Niort Train Station et Mairie de Niort. L'aГғВ©roport le plus proche (AГғВ©roport de Poitiers-Biard) est ГғВ  68 km.
hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Les Vieilles Vignes in ThorignГғВ© offers a bed and breakfast experience with a beautiful garden and a year-round outdoor swimming pool. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
Comfortable Amenities: Guests can enjoy air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and fully equipped kitchens. Additional amenities include a shared kitchen, outdoor seating area, and free on-site private parking. The property is pet-friendly.
Local Attractions: Niort Train Station is 18 km away, Niort Townhall and The Pilori Museum are 19 km distant, and Le Moulin du Roc lies 19 km from the property. Poitiers-Biard Airport is 68 km away. Cycling enthusiasts can explore the surrounding area.
Distance in property description is calculated using ГӮВ© OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Les Vieilles Vignes ofrece alojamiento con piscina al aire libre abierta todo el aГғВұo, wifi gratis y parking privado gratis en ThorignГғВ©.

El alojamiento tiene aire acondicionado, cocina totalmente equipada, TV y baГғВұo privado con ducha y secador de pelo. TambiГғВ©n se ofrece microondas y tostadora, ademГғВЎs de cafetera y hervidor.

En el bed and breakfast, la clientela puede practicar ciclismo en los alrededores o disfrutar del jardГғВӯn.

Niort Train Station estГғВЎ a 18 km del alojamiento, y Niort Townhall estГғВЎ a 19 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Poitiers-Biard) estГғВЎ a 68 km.

Las distancias en la descripciГғВіn del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMapГӮВ©
hotels.description_pt:
Apresentando uma piscina exterior aberta todo o ano, Les Vieilles Vignes encontra-se em ThorignГғВ© e fornece acomodaГғВ§ГғВөes com acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e estacionamento privado gratuito, para os hГғВіspedes que viajam de carro.

O alojamento estГғВЎ equipado ar condicionado e possui uma cozinha, uma televisГғВЈo e uma casa de banho privativa com chuveiro e um secador de cabelo. Um micro-ondas e torradeira tambГғВ©m estГғВЈo disponГғВӯveis, assim como uma mГғВЎquina de cafГғВ© e uma chaleira.

Os hГғВіspedes de Les Vieilles Vignes podem praticar ciclismo nas proximidades, ou aproveitar ao mГғВЎximo o jardim.

Niort Train Station fica a 18 km de Les Vieilles Vignes, enquanto Niort Townhall fica a 19 km de distГғВўncia. O Aeroporto de Poitiers-Biard fica a 68 km da propriedade.
hotels.description_it:
Les Vieilles Vignes offre una piscina scoperta aperta tutto l'anno e prevede alloggi a ThorignГғВ© con WiFi gratuito e parcheggio privato gratuito.

Gli alloggi sono dotati di aria condizionata, cucina con utensili, TV e bagno privato con doccia e asciugacapelli. In dotazione anche un forno a microonde e un tostapane, oltre a una macchina da caffГғВЁ e un bollitore elettrico.

Durante il vostro soggiorno presso questo bed and breakfast, potrete praticare il ciclismo nelle vicinanze o approfittare del giardino.

Niort Train Station ГғВЁ a 18 km da Les Vieilles Vignes, mentre Niort Townhall si trova a 19 km di distanza. Aeroporto di Poitiers Biard si trova a 68 km dalla struttura.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con ГӮВ© OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: Villa Mitsou
hotels.description_fr:
LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement Villa Mitsou vous accueille ГғВ  Melle, ГғВ  29 km de ce lieu dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Niort Train Station. Il possГғВЁde un jardin, des hГғВ©bergements non-fumeurs, ainsi qu'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans lГўвӮ¬в„ўensemble de ses locaux. Il se trouve ГғВ  respectivement 23 km, 30 km et 30 km de : MusГғВ©e des tumulus de Bougon, Parc animalier ZoodyssГғВ©e et Mairie de Niort. Vous pourrez admirer la vue sur le jardin.

Les hГғВ©bergements comportent une armoire. Vous bГғВ©nГғВ©ficierez d'une salle de bains privative dotГғВ©e dГўвӮ¬в„ўune douche, d'articles de toilette gratuits et d'un sГғВЁche-cheveux. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont fournis.

Un petit-dГғВ©jeuner continental est servi sur place.

Vous sГғВ©journerez ГғВ  respectivement 30 km et 30 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘtГӮВ : MusГғВ©e du Pilori et Le Moulin du Roc.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Villa Mitsou in Melle offers family rooms with private bathrooms, parquet floors, and garden views. Each room includes a tea and coffee maker, hairdryer, and free toiletries.
Essential Facilities: Guests enjoy a garden, free WiFi, and an outdoor dining area. Additional amenities include a work desk, sofa, and interconnected rooms.
Breakfast and Services: A continental breakfast is served daily, featuring chocolates or cookies. The property provides a comfortable environment with a friendly host.
Local Attractions: Niort Train Station is 29 km away, Tumulus de Bougon Museum 23 km, and Poitiers-Biard Airport 64 km from the guest house.
Couples particularly like the location ГўвӮ¬вҖқ they rated it 9.5 for a two-person trip.
hotels.description_es:
Villa Mitsou estГғВЎ en Melle, a 29 km de Niort Train Station, y tiene jardГғВӯn, habitaciones libres de humo y wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento. El alojamiento se encuentra a 23 km de Museo Tumulus de Bougon, a 30 km de Zoodyssee y a 30 km de Niort Townhall. Hay vistas al jardГғВӯn.

En el hostal o pensiГғВіn, las habitaciones cuentan con armario. El baГғВұo privado estГғВЎ equipado con ducha, artГғВӯculos de aseo gratuitos y secador de pelo. En Villa Mitsou, las habitaciones tienen ropa de cama y toallas.

En el alojamiento se sirve un desayuno continental.

Museo Le Pilori estГғВЎ a 30 km del alojamiento, y Le Moulin du Roc estГғВЎ a 30 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Poitiers-Biard) estГғВЎ a 64 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicaciГғВіn ГўвӮ¬вҖқ Le han puesto un 9,5 para viajes de dos personas.
hotels.description_pt:
Em Melle, a cerca de 29 km de Niort Train Station, Villa Mitsou tem um jardim, quartos nГғВЈo fumador e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade. O alojamento encontra-se a 23 km de NecrГғВіpole de Bougon, a 30 km de ZoodyssГғВ©e (jardim zoolГғВіgico) e a 30 km de Niort Townhall. Os hГғВіspedes podem desfrutar de vistas do jardim.

No alojamento, os quartos incluem roupeiro. Cada quarto inclui uma casa de banho privativa com chuveiro, produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos e um secador de cabelo. No alojamento, cada quarto estГғВЎ equipado com roupa de cama e toalhas.

Villa Mitsou disponibiliza pequeno-almoГғВ§o continental.

Galeria de Pilori fica a 30 km de Villa Mitsou, enquanto Le Moulin du Roc estГғВЎ a 30 km da propriedade. O Aeroporto de Poitiers-Biard fica a 64 km de distГғВўncia.
hotels.description_it:
Ubicato a Melle, a 29 km da Niort Train Station, Villa Mitsou offre un giardino, camere non fumatori e il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura. LГўвӮ¬в„ўalloggio ГғВЁ situato a 23 km da Tumuli di Bougon, 30 km da Parco Zoologico di Zoodyssee e 30 km da Niort Townhall. Gli ospiti possono godersi la vista sul giardino dalla camera.

Presso questo affittacamere, le camere comprendono un armadio. Ogni camera include un bagno privato con doccia, set di cortesia e asciugacapelli. Presso Villa Mitsou, ogni camera ГғВЁ dotata di lenzuola e asciugamani.

Questa struttura offre una colazione continentale.

Museo Bernard-d'Agesci ГғВЁ a 30 km da Villa Mitsou, mentre Le Moulin du Roc si trova a 30 km dalla struttura. Aeroporto di Poitiers Biard si trova a 64 km di distanza.

hotels.name: Le 123 SГғВ©bastopol - Astotel
hotels.description_fr:
SituГғВ© dans le 2eГӮВ arrondissement de Paris, ГғВ  seulement 150ГӮВ mГғВЁtres de la station de mГғВ©tro RГғВ©aumur-SГғВ©bastopol, lГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement Le 123 SГғВ©bastopolГӮВ -ГӮВ Astotel dispose dГўвӮ¬в„ўune terrasse, dГўвӮ¬в„ўune bagagerie et dГўвӮ¬в„ўune rГғВ©ception ouverte 24h/24. LГўвӮ¬в„ўhГғВҙtel est installГғВ© ГғВ  seulement 10ГӮВ minutes ГғВ  pied de la place de la RГғВ©publique.

PrГғВ©sentant une dГғВ©coration inspirГғВ©e du cinГғВ©ma, toutes les chambres comportent la climatisation, une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat ainsi qu'un minibar avec des boissons sans alcool gratuites. La salle de bains privative est pourvue dГўвӮ¬в„ўun sГғВЁche-cheveux. Chaque ГғВ©tage rend hommage ГғВ  un artiste de cinГғВ©ma spГғВ©cifique et chaque chambre comprend un minibar approvisionnГғВ© en boissons sans alcool gratuites.

Le 123 SГғВ©bastopol sert un petit-dГғВ©jeuner buffet chaque matin.
hotels.description_en:
Located in the 2nd district of Paris, just 150 metres from RГғВ©amur-SГғВ©bastopol Metro Station, 123 SГғВ©bastopol offers a terrace, 24-hour reception and luggage storage. Place de la RГғВ©publique is only a 10-minute walk away.

With a cinema-inspired dГғВ©cor, all rooms are air-conditioned and has a flat-screen TV, a minibar with free soft drinks. The en suite bathroom includes a hairdryer. Each floor pays tribute to a specific cinema artist and each room includes complimentary non-alcoholic beverages in the minibar.

A buffet breakfast is served each morning at 123 SГғВ©bastopol and it can also be enjoyed in the comfort of your own room. Restaurants can be found within walking distance.
hotels.description_es:
El 123 SГғВ©bastopol estГғВЎ situado en el distrito 2 de ParГғВӯs, a solo 150 metros de la estaciГғВіn de metro de RГғВ©amur-SГғВ©bastopol, y ofrece terraza, recepciГғВіn 24 horas y consigna de equipaje. La Place de la RГғВ©publique estГғВЎ situada a solo 10 minutos a pie.

Las habitaciones presentan una decoraciГғВіn inspirada en el cine. Todas ellas incluyen aire acondicionado, TV de pantalla plana y minibar con refrescos gratuitos. El baГғВұo privado incluye secador de pelo. Cada planta rinde homenaje a un artista de cine y cada habitaciГғВіn cuenta con bebidas sin alcohol gratuitas en el minibar.

El 123 SГғВ©bastopol sirve todas las maГғВұanas un desayuno buffet que tambiГғВ©n se puede tomar en la habitaciГғВіn. A poca distancia a pie, se pueden encontrar varios restaurantes.
hotels.description_pt:
O Le 123 SГғВ©bastopol situa-se no 2.ГӮВә arrondissement de Paris, apenas a 150 metros da EstaГғВ§ГғВЈo de Metro RГғВ©amur-SГғВ©bastopol, onde disponibiliza um terraГғВ§o, receГғВ§ГғВЈo 24 horas e um depГғВіsito de bagagens. A Place de la RГғВ©publique fica apenas a 10 minutos a pГғВ©.

Todos os quartos climatizados apresentam uma decoraГғВ§ГғВЈo inspirada no cinema e incluem uma televisГғВЈo de ecrГғВЈ plano e um minibar com refrigerantes gratuitos. A casa de banho privativa tem um secador de cabelo. Cada piso presta homenagem a um artista de cinema especГғВӯfico e cada um dos quarto providencia bebidas sem ГғВЎlcool gratuitas no minibar.

O 123 SГғВ©bastopol serve um buffet de pequeno-almoГғВ§o todas as manhГғВЈs, que tambГғВ©m pode ser saboreado no conforto dos quartos. Existem restaurantes a dois passos.
hotels.description_it:
Situato nel 2ГӮВ° arrondissement di Parigi, a soli 150 metri dalla Stazione della Metropolitana RГғВ©aumur-Sebastopol, il 123 SГғВ©bastopol offre una terrazza, una reception aperta 24 ore su 24 e un deposito bagagli. Place de la RГғВ©publique ГғВЁ raggiungibile in soli 10 minuti a piedi.

Arredate in stile cinematografico, tutte le camere sono dotate di aria condizionata, TV a schermo piatto e minibar con bevande analcoliche gratuite. Inoltre, gli alloggi includono 1 bagno interno con asciugacapelli. Ogni piano rende specificamente omaggio a un artista del cinema, e tutte le unitГғВ  comprende bevande analcoliche gratuite nel minibar.

Ogni mattina al 123 SГғВ©bastopol gusterete una colazione a buffet, servita anche nel comfort della vostra sistemazione. A pochi passi scoprirete alcuni ristoranti.

hotels.name: Hotel des Deux-Iles - Notre-Dame
hotels.description_fr:
L'HГғВҙtel Des Deux-Iles est un bГғВўtiment typique du XVIIe siГғВЁcle situГғВ© sur la charmante et historique ГғВ®le Saint-Louis, ГғВ  seulement 10 minutes ГғВ  pied de la cathГғВ©drale Notre-Dame ainsi que du quartier du Marais.
Ses chambres climatisГғВ©es sont dГғВ©corГғВ©es avec simplicitГғВ© et ГғВ©lГғВ©gance. Chacune comprend une salle de bains privative, une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision par satellite et un minibar.
Un petit-dГғВ©jeuner buffet est proposГғВ© tous les matins et peut ГғВӘtre servi dans votre chambre sur demande.
Le musГғВ©e du Louvre se trouve ГғВ  20 minutes ГғВ  pied de l'HГғВҙtel Des Deux-Iles, tandis que le jardin du Luxembourg est ГғВ  moins de 2 km. La station de mГғВ©tro Pont Marie, ГғВ  400 mГғВЁtres de lГғВ , offre un accГғВЁs direct ГғВ  l'OpГғВ©ra Garnier et au grand magasin Les Galeries Lafayette.
hotels.description_en:
The HГғВҙtel Des Deux-Iles is a typical 17th century building located in the charming and historical Ile Saint-Louis, just a 10-minute walk from Notre Dame Cathedral and the Marais district.
The air-conditioned bedrooms are decorated with simplicity and elegance. Free Wi-Fi access, satellite TV and a minibar are provided in each en suite room.
A buffet breakfast is prepared every morning at this hotel, and it can be served to your room upon request.
The Louvre Museum is a 20-minute walk from the HГғВҙtel Des Deux-Iles whilst the Luxembourg Garden is 1.7 km away. Pont Marie Metro Station is 400 metres from the hotel and provides direct access to the OpГғВ©ra Garnier and Galeries LaFayette Department Store.
Couples particularly like the location ГўвӮ¬вҖқ they rated it 9.9 for a two-person trip.
hotels.description_es:
El HГғВҙtel Des Deux-Iles es un edificio tГғВӯpico del siglo XVII situado en la preciosa isla histГғВіrica ГғЕҪle Saint-Louis, a solo 10 minutos a pie de la catedral de Notre Dame y del distrito Le Marais.
Los dormitorios disponen de aire acondicionado y presentan una decoraciГғВіn sencilla y elegante. Todas las habitaciones incluyen baГғВұo incorporado, WiFi gratuita, TV vГғВӯa satГғВ©lite y minibar.
Este hotel sirve un desayuno buffet diario, que los huГғВ©spedes pueden tomar en las habitaciones, bajo peticiГғВіn.
El Museo del Louvre se encuentra a 20 minutos a pie del HГғВҙtel Des Deux-Iles y el parque pГғВәblico JardГғВӯn del Luxemburgo, a 1,7 km. La estaciГғВіn de metro Pont Marie estГғВЎ a 400 metros del hotel y permite el acceso directo al edificio ГғвҖңpera Garnier y a los grandes almacenes Galeries LaFayette.
hotels.description_pt:
O HГғВҙtel Des Deux-Iles ГғВ© um edifГғВӯcio tГғВӯpico do sГғВ©culo XVII localizado no charmosa e histГғВіrica ГғВЎrea de Ile Saint-Louis, apenas a 10 minutos a pГғВ© da Catedral de Notre Dame e do bairro de Marais.
Os quartos climatizados estГғВЈo decorados com simplicidade e elegГғВўncia. Cada quarto com casa de banho privativa disponibiliza acesso Wi-Fi gratuito, uma televisГғВЈo por satГғВ©lite e um mini-bar.
Um buffet de pequeno-almoГғВ§o ГғВ© preparado todas as manhГғВЈs neste hotel, e o pequeno-almoГғВ§o tambГғВ©m pode ser servido no quarto dos hГғВіspedes mediante pedido.
O Museu do Louvre fica a 20 minutos a pГғВ© do HГғВҙtel Des Deux-Iles, enquanto o Jardim de Luxemburgo estГғВЎ a 1,7 km. A EstaГғВ§ГғВЈo de Metro Pont Marie fica a 400 metros do hotel e proporciona acesso directo ГғВ  OpГғВ©ra Garnier e ГғВ s Galerias Lafayette (galerias comerciais).
hotels.description_it:
Ospitato in un tipico edificio del 17ГӮВ° secolo situato nell'incantevole e storica Ile Saint-Louis, l'HГғВҙtel Des Deux-Iles sorge a soli 10 minuti a piedi dalla Cattedrale di Notre Dame e dal quartiere Marais.
Arredate in modo sobrio ed elegante, le camere dispongono di aria condizionata, WiFi gratuito, TV satellitare, minibar e bagno interno.
Ogni mattina in hotel vi attende una colazione a buffet, che potrete gustare su richiesta anche nella vostra sistemazione.
Dall'HГғВҙtel Des Deux-Iles raggiungerete il Museo del Louvre in 20 minuti di cammino, mentre soggiornerete a 1,7 km dal Giardino di Lussemburgo e a 400 metri dalla stazione della metropolitana Pont Marie, che offre collegamenti diretti con l'OpГғВ©ra Garnier e il centro commerciale Galeries Lafayette.

hotels.name: HГғВҙtel Le PresbytГғВЁre
hotels.description_fr:
L'HГғВҙtel Le PresbytГғВЁre vous accueille dans un ancien presbytГғВЁre. Il est situГғВ© dans le centre de Paris, ГғВ  seulement 300 mГғВЁtres du cГғВ©lГғВЁbre Centre Pompidou et ГғВ  350 mГғВЁtres du centre commercial des Halles. Notre-Dame de Paris est ГғВ  800 mГғВЁtres.
RГғВ©parties sur 5 ГғВ©tages, les chambres de cet hГғВҙtel 3 ГғВ©toiles disposent toutes d'une salle de bains privative. Leur dГғВ©coration et leur mobilier gothiques vous plongeront dans une autre ГғВ©poque. Un plateau de courtoisie est mis ГғВ  votre disposition en chambre.
Un petit-dГғВ©jeuner continental est servi quotidiennement, dans le confort de votre chambre sur rГғВ©servation prГғВ©alable. Vous trouverez des bars et des restaurants ГғВ  quelques minutes de marche.
hotels.description_en:
HГғВҙtel Le PresbytГғВЁre is set in a former presbytery. It is located in the centre of Paris, a mere 300 metres from the famous Pompidou Centre and 350 metres from Les Halles shopping centre. Notre-Dame de Paris is 800 metres away.
Set over 5 floors, each room in this 3-star hotel has an en suite bathroom. The Gothic decoration and furnishings will transport guests to another time. A courtesy tray is provided in each of them.
A continental breakfast is served daily, in the comfort of your rooms if booked in advance. Bars and restaurants can be found within a walking distance.
Chatelet metro station (lines 1, 4, 7, 11 and 14) is just 350 metres from HГғВҙtel Le PresbytГғВЁre, making it easy for guests to discover the parts of Paris that are further away. A public car park is available at a surcharge.
hotels.description_es:
El HГғВҙtel Le PresbytГғВЁre ocupa una antigua casa parroquial. Se encuentra en el centro de ParГғВӯs, a solo 300 metros del famoso Centro Pompidou y a 350 metros del centro comercial Les Halles. Notre-Dame de ParГғВӯs se encuentra a 800 metros.
Las habitaciones de este hotel de 3 estrellas estГғВЎn distribuidas en 5 plantas y disponen de baГғВұo privado. La decoraciГғВіn y el mobiliario gГғВіticos transportarГғВЎn a los huГғВ©spedes a otra ГғВ©poca. Todas incluyen set de tГғВ© y cafГғВ©.
Todos los dГғВӯas se sirve un desayuno continental en las habitaciones, si se reserva con antelaciГғВіn. Hay bares y restaurantes a poca distancia a pie.
La estaciГғВіn de metro de Chatelet (lГғВӯneas 1, 4, 7, 11 y 14) estГғВЎ a sГғВіlo 350 metros del HГғВҙtel Le PresbytГғВЁre, por lo que es fГғВЎcil que los huГғВ©spedes descubran el resto de ParГғВӯs.
hotels.description_pt:
O HГғВҙtel Le PresbytГғВЁre estГғВЎ situado num antigo presbitГғВ©rio. EstГғВЎ localizado no centro de Paris, apenas a 300 metros do famoso Centro Pompidou e a 350 metros do Centro Comercial Les Halles. Notre-Dame de Paris fica a 800 metros.
DistribuГғВӯdo por 5 pisos, cada quarto deste hotel de 3 estrelas tem uma casa de banho privativa. O mobiliГғВЎrio e a decoraГғВ§ГғВЈo gГғВіtica irГғВЈo transportar os hГғВіspedes para outra ГғВ©poca. Uma bandeja de cortesia ГғВ© fornecida em cada um.

hotels.description_it:
L'HГғВҙtel Le PresbytГғВЁre occupa un ex presbiterio. Si trova nel centro di Parigi, a soli 300 m dal famoso Centro Pompidou e a 350 m dal centro commerciale Les Halles. Notre-Dame de Paris dista 800 m.
Distribuite su 5 piani, le camere di questo hotel a 3 stelle dispongono di bagno interno. La decorazione e gli arredi gotici vi condurranno in un altro momento. A vostra disposizione anche un vassoio di cortesia.
La colazione continentale viene servita ogni giorno nel comfort della vostra camera, previa prenotazione anticipata. A pochi passi troverete bar e ristoranti.
L'HГғВҙtel Le PresbytГғВЁre dista appena 350 m dalla stazione della metropolitana Chatelet (linee 1, 4, 7, 11 e 14), che vi consentirГғВ  di esplorare facilmente le zone di Parigi.

hotels.name: Hotel Le Mas Trilles
hotels.description_fr:
L'Hotel Le Mas Trilles est situГғВ© au pied des PyrГғВ©nГғВ©es, ГғВ  2 km de la ville de Ceret. Il dispose d'une piscine extГғВ©rieure chauffГғВ©e.

Hotel Le Mas Trilles serves a daily continental breakfast on the main terrace overlooking the garden.
Free private parking is available for guests exploring the PyrГғВ©nГғВ©es-Orientales region by car.  The Spanish border is 18 km away and the beaches of Argeles-sur-Mer are a 30-minute drive from Le Mas Trilles.

hotels.name: Chateau d'Urbilhac

Une maison de vacances est ГғВ©galement disponible sur place. Cet ГғВ©tablissement se trouve ГғВ  6 minutes en voiture du centre de Lamastre et propose un court de tennis, une piscine extГғВ©rieure et des massages.

Toutes les chambres offrent une vue sur le jardin et disposent d'une salle de bains privative pourvue d'une baignoire ou d'une douche. Un sГғВЁche-cheveux, des peignoirs et des articles de toilette gratuits sont ГғВ©galement fournis. Certaines chambres possГғВЁdent une terrasse.

Set within 30 hectares of parkland in Ardeche, ChГғВўteau D'urbilhac offers guestrooms in a castle restored in the 19th Century. There is also a holiday home on site. The property is a 6-minute drive from the centre of Lamastre and offers a tennis court, an outdoor pool and massage treatments.

All rooms have garden views and a private bathroom fitted with a bath or shower. A hairdryer, bathrobes and free toiletries are provided. Some rooms have a terrace.

Breakfast is served daily at the property and can be enjoyed on the terrace, weather permitting. It includes fresh juice, bread, yoghurts, small pastries and homemade jams. The hotelГўвӮ¬в„ўs restaurant serves meals made with local produce upon reservation, while there is also a bar with a fireplace.

El establecimiento se encuentra a 6 minutos en coche del centro de Lamastre y ofrece una pista de tenis, una piscina al aire libre y tratamientos de masaje.

Todas las habitaciones tienen vistas al jardГғВӯn y baГғВұo privado con baГғВұera o ducha. Incluye secador de pelo, albornoces y artГғВӯculos de aseo gratuitos. Algunas habitaciones tienen terraza.

El establecimiento sirve un desayuno diario que se puede tomar en la terraza cuando hace buen tiempo. Incluye zumo reciГғВ©n hecho, pan, yogures, bollerГғВӯa pequeГғВұa y mermeladas caseras. El restaurante del hotel sirve comidas elaboradas con productos locales previa reserva.

Al mattino vi attende la colazione, che potrete gustare sulla terrazza nelle giornate di bel tempo. Comprende succhi freschi, pane, yogurt, piccoli prodotti da forno e marmellate fatte in casa.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: La Maison des Ducs in ChambГғВ©ry offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and free WiFi. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and soundproofing for a pleasant stay.
Dining and Leisure: Guests can enjoy a buffet breakfast and lunch at the on-site restaurant. The hotel features a sun terrace, garden, bar, and outdoor seating area. Additional amenities include a lounge, coffee shop, and picnic area.
Prime Location: Located 500 metres from ChambГғВ©ry Train Station and a 2-minute walk to the Fountain of Elephants, the hotel is near attractions such as Chateau des Ducs de Savoie (6-minute walk) and Bourget Lake (20 km). ChambГғВ©ry-Savoie Airport is 9 km away.
Couples particularly like the location ГўвӮ¬вҖқ they rated it 9.4 for a two-person trip.
hotels.description_es:
La Maison des Ducs tiene jardГғВӯn, salГғВіn de uso comГғВәn, terraza y restaurante en ChambГғВ©ry. Este hotel de 3 estrellas tiene wifi gratis, recepciГғВіn 24 horas y guardaequipaje. Hay bar.
El hotel ofrece habitaciones con aire acondicionado, escritorio, cafetera, minibar, caja fuerte, TV de pantalla plana y baГғВұo privado con ducha. Las habitaciones incluyen hervidor, y algunas tambiГғВ©n ofrecen zona de cocina con nevera y microondas. En La Maison des Ducs, cada habitaciГғВіn cuenta con ropa de cama y toallas.
En el alojamiento se sirve un desayuno buffet.
Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interГғВ©s como Fuente de los Elefantes, EstaciГғВіn de tren de ChambГғВ©ry y Chateau des Ducs de Savoie. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de ChambГғВ©ry - Savoya) estГғВЎ a 9 km.
hotels.description_pt:
La Maison des Ducs tem um jardim, salГғВЈo partilhado, um terraГғВ§o e restaurante em ChambГғВ©ry. Este hotel de 3 estrelas dispГғВөe de uma receГғВ§ГғВЈo aberta 24 horas, depГғВіsito de bagagens e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito. Os hГғВіspedes tГғВӘm ГғВ  sua disposiГғВ§ГғВЈo um bar.
O alojamento providencia quartos com ar condicionado, secretГғВЎria, mГғВЎquina de cafГғВ©, um minibar, cofre, televisГғВЈo de ecrГғВЈ plano e uma casa de banho privativa com chuveiro. Os quartos incluem chaleira, enquanto alguns quartos tambГғВ©m apresentam uma kitchenette com um frigorГғВӯfico e um micro-ondas. No alojamento, cada quarto inclui roupa de cama e toalhas.
La Maison des Ducs disponibiliza pequeno-almoГғВ§o buffet.
hotels.description_it:
La Maison des Ducs offre un giardino, una sala comune, una terrazza e un ristorante a ChambГғВ©ry. Questo hotel a 3 stelle offre una reception 24 ore su 24, un deposito bagagli e il WiFi gratuito. Gli ospiti possono usufruire di un bar.
Questo hotel offre agli ospiti camere climatizzate con una scrivania, una macchina da caffГғВЁ, un minibar e una cassaforte. Non manca poi la TV a schermo piatto e il bagno privato con doccia. Tutte le camere comprendono un bollitore elettrico, mentre alcune camere dispongono anche di un angolo cottura con un frigorifero e un microonde. Presso La Maison des Ducs, le camere comprendono lenzuola e asciugamani.
Questa struttura offre una colazione a buffet.

Breakfast is served every day and includes pastries, bread, deli meats, cheese, fruits and eggs. Several restaurants can be found in the village.

Ogni mattina vi attende una colazione a base di prodotti da forno, pane, salumi, formaggi, frutta e uova. Nel villaggio troverete diversi ristoranti.
La zona ГғВЁ rinomata per l'equitazione. Nelle vicinanze potrete noleggiare l'attrezzatura da sci. L'Logis HГғВҙtel de Paris dista 19 km da Le Mont-Dore e 16 km da Super Besse. 44 km dall'Aeroporto di Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne.

Relaxing Facilities: Guests can enjoy a sun terrace, garden, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a coffee shop, outdoor seating area, and bicycle parking. Free on-site private parking is available.
Local Attractions: Located 11 km from the Cathedral of St. Louis of Blois and Blois Train Station, 12 km from Blois Castle, and 19 km from ChГғВўteau de Chambord. Tours Val de Loire Airport is 64 km away.
Guest Favorites: Guests highly rate the breakfast provided by the property, the attentive host, and the quietness of the area.

hotels.name: Villa Ludwig Suite Hotel

The breakfast is included and offers a large choice served inside or outside on the beautiful terrace with a view.
Our Concierge can make reservations in different restaurants and arrange Castle tickets.

Au Relais Saint Maurice is a bed and breakfast. In Chinon, in the Center region, country of the Loire Castles.
The house is located in the medieval semi-pedestrian zone 500 meters from the ChГғВўteau de Chinon.
On the ground floor are the breakfast room, the lounge and the Bar (License IV) as well as the terrace and the garden. Upstairs, each bedroom is equipped with a flat-screen TV, a seating area and a private bathroom. Free Wi-Fi throughout the house.
The nearest airport is Tours Loire Valley Airport, 47 km away.
Couples particularly like the location ГўвӮ¬вҖқ they rated it 10.0 for a two-person trip.

Elegant Accommodation: La Roulotte de Chiroubles in Chiroubles offers a country house with a sun terrace, garden, bar, and free WiFi. Private check-in and check-out services ensure a seamless arrival and departure.
Comfortable Amenities: Guests enjoy a hot tub, outdoor play area, picnic spots, and family rooms. Additional facilities include a children's playground, bicycle parking, and free on-site private parking.

hotels.name: ChГғВўteau de Montcaud
hotels.description_fr:
Le ChГғВўteau de Montcaud est situГғВ© ГғВ  Sabran, en Provence. EntourГғВ© de 5 hectares de terrain, l'ГғВ©tablissement occupe l'ancienne rГғВ©sidence privГғВ©e d'un plateau de soie. AprГғВЁs 2 ans, l'hГғВҙtel a ГғВ©tГғВ© entiГғВЁrement rГғВ©novГғВ© et rouvrira en juin 2018. Il dispose d'une rГғВ©ception ouverte 24h/24, d'une piscine extГғВ©rieure, d'un service de concierge et d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.
Les 29 chambres et suites comprennent une bouilloire et une salle de bains privative, tandis que la suite familiale et la maison de 2 chambres possГғВЁdent chacune une terrasse. Toutes les chambres du ChГғВўteau de Montcaud disposent de la climatisation et d'une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat. Toutes les chambres offrent une vue sur le parc.
Sur place, vous pourrez profiter d'un bistrot franГғВ§ais traditionnel et d'un restaurant gastronomique.
hotels.description_en:
ChГғВўteau de Montcaud is located in Sabran, in the Provence region. The property is set in the former private residence of a silk trader and is surrounded by five hectares of grounds. After a 2 year renovation the hotel has been fully refurbished and re-opened in June 2018. It features a 24-hour front desk, an outdoor swimming pool, a concierge service and free WiFi.
The 29 rooms and suites include a kettle and a private bathroom, while the Family Suite and Two-Bedroom House will each provide you with a terrace. At ChГғВўteau de Montcaud, each room includes air conditioning and a flat-screen TV. All the rooms have views of the park.
On site, guests can enjoy a traditional French bistrot and a gourmet restaurant.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cГғВіmo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el ChГғВўteau de Montcaud

El ChГғВўteau de Montcaud se encuentra en Sabran, en la regiГғВіn de Provenza. El establecimiento estГғВЎ ubicado en una antigua residencia privada de trazado de seda y estГғВЎ rodeado por 5 hectГғВЎreas de terreno. Tras 2 aГғВұos, el hotel ha sido completamente reformado y vuelve a abrir en junio de 2018. Cuenta con recepciГғВіn 24 horas, piscina al aire libre, servicio de conserjerГғВӯa y conexiГғВіn Wi-Fi gratuita.

Las 29 habitaciones y suites incluyen hervidor de agua y baГғВұo privado, mientras que la suite familiar y la casa de 2 dormitorios tienen terraza. Las habitaciones del ChГғВўteau de Montcaud cuentan con aire acondicionado y TV de pantalla plana. Todas las habitaciones tienen vistas al parque.
hotels.description_pt:
Sinta-se como uma celebridade com o serviГғВ§o de topo de ChГғВўteau de Montcaud

O ChГғВўteau de Montcaud estГғВЎ localizado em Sabran, na regiГғВЈo de ProvenГғВ§a. A propriedade estГғВЎ situada na antiga residГғВӘncia privada de um trder de seda e estГғВЎ rodeada por 5 hectares de terreno. ApГғВіs uma renovaГғВ§ГғВЈo de 2 anos, o hotel foi totalmente remodelado e reaberto em Junho de 2018. Disponibiliza uma recepГғВ§ГғВЈo 24 horas, uma piscina exterior, um serviГғВ§o de concierge e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito.

Os 29 quartos e suites incluem uma chaleira e uma casa de banho privativa, enquanto a Suite Familiar e a Casa com 2 Quartos dispГғВөem de um terraГғВ§o. No ChГғВўteau de Montcaud, cada quarto inclui ar condicionado e uma televisГғВЈo de ecrГғВЈ plano. Todos os quartos oferecem vistas para o parque.
hotels.description_it:
Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso ChГғВўteau de Montcaud

Lo ChГғВўteau de Montcaud si trova a Sabran, in Provenza. La struttura occupa l'antica residenza privata di un trader di seta ed ГғВЁ circondata da 5 ettari di terreno. Dopo una ristrutturazione di 2 anni, l'hotel ГғВЁ stato completamente ristrutturato e riaperto a giugno 2018. Avrete a disposizione una reception aperta 24 ore su 24, una piscina all'aperto, il servizio concierge e la connessione WiFi gratuita.

Le 29 camere e suite includono un bollitore e un bagno privato, mentre la suite familiare e la casa con 2 camere da letto vantano una terrazza. Tutte le camere dello ChГғВўteau de Montcaud sono dotate di aria condizionata e TV a schermo piatto. Tutte le camere si affacciano sul parco.

hotels.description_en:
The Hotel U Frascone is located in the village Venaco, halfway between Ajaccio and Bastia. The hotel is in the heart of the Corsican Mountains and offers en-suite facilities and satellite TV.

The hotelГўвӮ¬в„ўs bar offers a panoramic view of the valley and guests will find a restaurant just 700 metres away. Free Wi-Fi access is also available in the bar.

Guests at Hotel U Frascone can easily visit the Musee de la Corse and enjoy local leisure activities such as fishing and horseback riding. Tennis courts are just 150 metres from the hotel.

Couples particularly like the location ГўвӮ¬вҖқ they rated it 9.0 for a two-person trip.

hotels.description_en:
Dominique Colonna is located in Corte. The property features a bar, and a terrace with river views where guests can enjoy a continental breakfast upon reservation. Free WiFi access is available throughout.

The rooms are soundproofed and come with air conditioning, a private terrace, a flat-screen TV and a minibar. The bathrooms have a bath or shower and come with a hairdryer and free toiletries. Extras include a safety deposit box.

At Dominique Colonna you will find a 24-hour front desk, a garden and a sundeck where you can relax. Other facilities offered at the property include a shared lounge and luggage storage.

Free parking is possible on site. The hotel is 55 km from Bastia Porreta Airport and 78 km from Ajaccio ГўвӮ¬вҖң NapolГғВ©on Bonaparte Airport.

Las habitaciones estГғВЎn insonorizadas y cuentan con aire acondicionado, terraza privada, TV de pantalla plana y minibar. Los baГғВұos incluyen baГғВұera o ducha, secador de pelo y artГғВӯculos de aseo gratuitos. AdemГғВЎs, hay caja fuerte.

El establecimiento Dominique Colonna dispone de recepciГғВіn abierta las 24 horas, jardГғВӯn, una terraza, un salГғВіn compartido y consigna de equipaje.

Se facilita aparcamiento gratuito. El hotel estГғВЎ situado a 55 km del aeropuerto de Bastia Porreta y a 78 km del aeropuerto de Ajaccio - NapolГғВ©on Bonaparte.

Climatizzate e insonorizzate, le camere dispongono di terrazza privata, TV a schermo piatto, minibar, cassaforte e bagno con asciugacapelli, set di cortesia e vasca o doccia.
